title: Authors and Citation
text: Ogasawara E, Castro , Gea C, Borges H, Carvalho D, Santos J, Bezerra E, Coutinho R (2023). daltoolbox: DAL ToolBox Package. https://github.com/cefet-rj-dal/daltoolbox, https://cefet-rj-dal.github.io/daltoolbox/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {daltoolbox: DAL ToolBox Package},   author = {Eduardo Ogasawara and Antonio Castro and Cristiane Gea and Heraldo Borges and Diego Carvalho and Joel Santos and Eduardo Bezerra and Rafaelli Coutinho},   year = {2023},   note = {https://github.com/cefet-rj-dal/daltoolbox, https://cefet-rj-dal.github.io/daltoolbox/}, }

title: DAL ToolBox Package
text: goal DAL Toolbox provide series data analytics functions organized framework. supports data preprocessing, classification, regression, clustering, time series prediction functions.

title: DAL ToolBox Package
text: can install development version dal GitHub :
code: library(devtools) devtools::install_github("cefet-rj-dal/daltoolbox", force=TRUE, dependencies=FALSE, upgrade="never", build_vignettes = TRUE)

title: DAL ToolBox Package
text: DAL Toolbox examples made available : https://nbviewer.org/github/cefet-rj-dal/daltoolbox-examples/tree/main/ examples organized according general (data preprocessing), clustering, classification, regression, time series functions.
code: library(daltoolbox) #> Registered S3 method overwritten by 'quantmod': #>   method            from #>   as.zoo.data.frame zoo #>  #> Attaching package: 'daltoolbox' #> The following object is masked from 'package:base': #>  #>     transform ## loading DAL Toolbox

title: Partition Around Medoids (PAM) Clustering — cluster_pam
text: Implements Partition Around Medoids (PAM) clustering algorithm. PAM partitioning clustering method seeks minimize sum dissimilarities data points medoid assigned cluster. Unlike k-means, PAM can handle categorical data well distance measures Euclidean distance.

title: Fit — fit_curvature
text: R, fit function generic function used fit model data set. fundamental function many machine learning algorithms statistical models. fit function takes data set model specification input returns object containing fitted model parameters relevant information

title: fit_curvature_max — fit_curvature_max
text: function creates object fitting curvature function uses maximum curvature value. resulting object can used transform data set using max curvature value.

title: fit_curvature_max — fit_curvature_max
text: Returns object class fit_curvature_max, inherits fit_curvature dal_transform classes. object contains list following elements: func: function used calculate curvature, set max. curvature: maximum curvature value calculated fitting process.

title: fit_curvature_max — fit_curvature_max
text: fit_curvature_max function extension fit_curvature function, creates object fitting curvature function based specified input function. fit_curvature_max function sets input function max, resulting curvature function calculates maximum curvature value. resulting object can used transform data set scaling data according maximum curvature value, using transform method.

title: fit_curvature_min — fit_curvature_min
text: function fit_curvature_min() fits curvature function dataset, returns list object results. function similar fit_curvature(), selects minimum value curvature function optimal cut point.

title: fit_curvature_min — fit_curvature_min
text: list object optimal cut point, values curvature function, input dataset, function used select optimal cut point (minimum value).

title: fit_curvature_min — fit_curvature_min
text: fit_curvature_min() function uses fit_curvature() function fit curvature function dataset. selects minimum value curvature function optimal cut point, returns list object following elements: cutoff: optimal cut point. curvature: values curvature function possible cut point. data: input dataset. func: function used select optimal cut point (minimum value).
